text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #11)

Can only say that with "FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE stable/13-n253365-d8521723a6b" - not work.

I can not play with bisect: host is in other country, if something happen - there is no hands or remote access to console to fix it. This host provides some services for me, I do not want lost it.
I hope to relocate it in next 3 month.

But I can update it to latest stable and retest, after #270190 get fixed.
